info.title: Lettermint Team API
info.description: API for managing your Lettermint team, projects, domains, webhooks, and more. Authenticate using your Team API token via Bearer authentication.

get.summary: List all domains for the team

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `domain`, `created_at`, `status_changed_at`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-domain`.

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: The number of results that will be returned per page.

parameters.name: page[cursor]
parameters.description: The cursor to start the pagination from.

parameters.name: filter[domain]
parameters.description: Search by domain name (partial match, case insensitive)

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

next_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the next set of items.

prev_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the previous set of items.

get.description: List all domains for the team

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Available includes are `dnsRecords`, `dnsRecordsCount`, `dnsRecordsExists`, `projects`, `projectsCount`, `projectsExists`. You can include multiple options by separating them with a comma.

get.description: Get domain details

post.summary: Verify all DNS records for a domain
post.description: Verify all DNS records for a domain

put.summary: Update projects associated with a domain
put.description: Update projects associated with a domain

get.description:
This endpoint can be used to check the API status and verify authentication.
It accepts both Team API tokens (via Bearer authentication) and Project tokens (via X-Lettermint-Token header).
Returns a paginated list of messages with filtering and sorting capabilities.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `type`, `status`, `from_email`, `subject`, `created_at`, `status_changed_at`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-type`.

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: The number of results that will be returned per page.

parameters.name: page[cursor]
parameters.description: The cursor to start the pagination from.

parameters.name: filter[route_id]
parameters.description: Filter by route ID

parameters.name: filter[domain_id]
parameters.description: Filter by domain ID

parameters.name: filter[tag]
parameters.description: Filter by tag name

parameters.name: filter[from_email]
parameters.description: Search by sender email (partial match)

parameters.name: filter[subject]
parameters.description: Search by subject (partial match)

parameters.name: filter[from_date]
parameters.description: Filter messages created after this date

parameters.name: filter[to_date]
parameters.description: Filter messages created before this date

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

next_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the next set of items.

prev_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the previous set of items.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific message including optional nested resources.
Returns a paginated list of events for a specific message with sorting capabilities.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `timestamp`, `event`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-timestamp`.

parameters.name: page[size]
parameters.description: The number of results that will be returned per page.

parameters.name: page[cursor]
parameters.description: The cursor to start the pagination from.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

next_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the next set of items.

prev_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the previous set of items.

get.description: Returns the raw EML source of the message.
Returns the HTML body of the message if available.
Returns the plain text body of the message if available.

get.description: List all projects for the team

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Available includes are `routes`, `routesCount`, `routesExists`, `domains`, `domainsCount`, `domainsExists`, `teamMembers`, `teamMembersCount`, `teamMembersExists`, `messageStats`, `messageStatsCount`, `messageStatsExists`. You can include multiple options by separating them with a comma.

get.description:
Returns aggregate message statistics for the specified date range.
Provide a project_id to get per-project stats with transactional/broadcast breakdown.
Without project_id, returns team-wide totals from team_message_stats.
Maximum date range is 90 days.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date (Y-m-d)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date (Y-m-d, max 90 days from `from`)

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Optional project UUID for project-scoped stats with transactional/broadcast breakdown

get.summary: List all suppressions for the team

parameters.description: Available sorts are `value`, `created_at`, `reason`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-value`.

Historical usage includes up to 12 most recent periods.

Returns a paginated list of webhooks with filtering options.
get.summary: List all webhooks for the team

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `name`, `url`, `created_at`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-name`.

parameters.name: filter[enabled]
parameters.description: Filter by enabled status

parameters.name: filter[event]
parameters.description: Filter by specific event type

parameters.name: filter[route_id]
parameters.description: Filter by route ID

parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search by webhook name or URL

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

next_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the next set of items.

prev_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the previous set of items.

post.description: Creates a webhook for a specific route and generates a secret for signature verification.

message.const: Webhook created successfully. Please save the secret as it will not be shown again.

get.description: Returns full webhook information including recent deliveries.

put.description: Updates webhook configuration. Events, URL, name, and enabled status can be modified.

delete.description: Permanently removes a webhook and all associated delivery records.

post.description: Dispatches a test webhook delivery to verify the endpoint is working correctly.
post.summary: Test a webhook by sending a sample payload

message.const: Test webhook dispatched successfully. Check the deliveries endpoint for results.

post.description: Generates a new secret for webhook signature verification. The old secret will be invalidated.

message.const: Webhook secret regenerated successfully. Please update your integration.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of delivery attempts for a specific webhook.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Available sorts are `created_at`, `attempt_number`. You can sort by multiple options by separating them with a comma. To sort in descending order, use `-` sign in front of the sort, for example: `-created_at`.

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Filter by delivery status

parameters.name: filter[event_type]
parameters.description: Filter by event type

parameters.name: filter[from_date]
parameters.description: Filter deliveries from this date (Y-m-d format)

parameters.name: filter[to_date]
parameters.description: Filter deliveries to this date (Y-m-d format)

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

next_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the next set of items.

prev_cursor.description: The "cursor" that points to the previous set of items.

get.description: Returns full details of a single delivery attempt including payload and response data.

http.description: Team API token. Find this in your team settings.

DnsRecordStatus.description:
| | |---| | `active`
The record is active and verified. | | `failed`
The record could not be verified. | | `pending`
The record is pending verification. |
DnsRecordStatus.title: DnsRecordStatus

DomainStatus.description:
| | |---| | `verified`
The domain is active and verified. | | `partially_verified`
Some DNS records of the domain could not be verified. | | `pending_verification`
The domain is new and verification is pending. | | `failed_verification`
The domain verification failed. |
DomainStatus.title: DomainStatus
